name: clean-isolated-change
description: A change to a leaf component used only within a single feature module — blast radius is trivially small.

pr.title: Improve tooltip copy in booking widget
pr.author: priya
pr.description: Updates the tooltip label text in the booking widget. No logic change, copy only.

files.apps/dashboard/src/components/booking/To: export const TooltipLabel = () => Book a session to get started;

agentResponse.summary: The change is confined to a single leaf component with no importers outside the booking feature. Blast radius is trivially small.
